overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at golden hour. The player moves from an outdoor urban street with elevated monorail tracks and brutalist architecture, descends into an NCART subway station, and continues through a graffiti-covered underground corridor with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated monorail and commercial buildings

events.description: pedestrians become visible near the NCART station entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street following a white sedan, passing modern parking structures and office towers

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead on the street, maintaining distance from the camera

entered.detail: large concrete elevated train track structure spanning across the street
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade
brutalist concrete parking structure with multiple open levels
massive concrete building with weathered facade and large emblem near the roof
tall illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the sidewalk
white car driving ahead on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban street bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera walks forward following a white sedan, passing beneath an elevated monorail track. To the right stands a multi-story parking garage, while a massive brutalist industrial building looms ahead. Digital advertising kiosks line the sidewalk, and the scene is sparsely populated with minimal pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station stairwell with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering the covered concrete stairwell of the NCART station
transitioning from warm golden hour sunlight to cool artificial overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: descending the concrete stairs into the subway station, following other pedestrians down the stairwell

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit descending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings descending underground
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and street art
large circular fluorescent lights mounted on the stairwell ceiling
illuminated green neon sign indicating the NCART station

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the NCART station stairwell, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed concrete structure. The lighting shifts dramatically from natural golden hour to artificial overhead lights. The walls are covered in dense graffiti and street art. Other pedestrians are visible descending the stairs ahead, including a person in red clothing. The industrial building and street elements fade from view as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground commercial corridor with neon signage and vending machines

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the underground neon-lit commercial corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the underground corridor past illuminated vending machines and neon signs, heading deeper into the station

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: long concrete corridor with graffiti-covered walls and ambient neon lighting
illuminated vending machines with colorful neon advertisements and glowing edges
thick concrete support beams covered in graffiti and stickers
glowing neon signage and illuminated wall advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the stairwell into a narrow underground corridor illuminated by vibrant neon lights. The walls are covered in graffiti and feature glowing signage. Vending machines line the right side, emitting colorful light. The space feels enclosed and cyberpunk in aesthetic, with support pillars and scattered pedestrians including a person in a green jacket walking ahead. The environment is entirely artificially lit with a moody, neon-drenched atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched urban street into the neon-lit depths of an underground transit station. It begins by walking along a wide road bathed in golden hour light, passing beneath an elevated monorail track and beside a massive brutalist industrial building. As the camera enters the NCART station stairwell, the natural sunlight fades, replaced by artificial overhead lighting and concrete walls layered in dense graffiti. The descent then opens into a narrow underground corridor where the atmosphere shifts entirely to a moody, cyberpunk aesthetic defined by vibrant neon signage and glowing vending machines. The scene finally settles into this enclosed subterranean space, following pedestrians past support pillars under a canopy of artificial, colorful light.
